claim_scope: Abstract selected-witness (pattern, cyclic order) frontier lead: S12A passes every currently implemented necessary abstract filter at the natural order (row caps, witness-pair capacity, two-overlap crossing, vertex-circle quotient, full Kalmanson cone LP screens, value rows). Euclidean realizability is a separate unproved question; the C6-symmetric realizations are excluded by the two-orbit circulant lemma, so any realization must be asymmetric. Not a counterexample to Erdos Problem #97 and no change to the official/global status.
structure: circulant with parity: even centers use offsets {1, 2, 10, 11}; odd centers use offsets {2, 5, 7, 10}
non_claims: not a counterexample to Erdos Problem #97
no change to the official/global falsifiable/open status
